knowledge: V30 Bicameral OS Fleet: Plane 1 = 6 Antigravity servers (StitchMCP, chrome-devtools-mcp, cloudrun, firebase-mcp-server, google-developer-knowledge, sequential-thinking) + gemini-graph-memory extension. Plane 2 = 17 Cline servers (observability, storage-cdn, stripe-governor, notebooklm-mcp, jules-delegation, semantic-scalpel, pomelli-swarm, workspace-intake, bigquery-mcp-server, maps-grounding-lite-mcp, container-mcp-server, compute-mcp-server, gemini-graph-memory, gemini-github-mcp, gemini-web-fetcher, dart-mcp, spanner-mcp). Total: 23 servers. Anti-Duplication Law enforced.

Plane 1 (Antigravity) has EXACTLY 6 servers (91 tools): StitchMCP(14), chrome-devtools-mcp(29), cloudrun(8), firebase-mcp-server(36), google-developer-knowledge(3), sequential-thinking(1). gemini-graph-memory is a Plane 2 (Cline) server ONLY — it is NOT a native Antigravity platform server.
